title: Remove c.String(net)
body:
We have a lot of cludgy code trying to make --net and --network equivalent.
This will allow --net to still exists but will eliminate the help and confusion.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Lots of tests are still using --net, so we have good test coverage.
Is it just me? I cannot see the cirrus jobs at the moment.
